entries.title: Goldman Sachs Says AI Will Eliminate 15 Million US Jobs
entries.summary: Goldman Sachs has increased its estimate of the share of U.S. jobs that could be displaced by generative artificial intelligence (AI) from the previous 6-7% to over 9%, Seeking Alpha reported Thursday (June 25). That displacement, which would amount to about 15 million workers, could take place over 10 years, Goldman Sachs Economist Joseph Briggs said in […] The post Goldman Sachs Says AI Wi

entries.title: Albertsons Adds Sponsored Product Discovery to AI Grocery Search
entries.summary: Albertsons has launched a new integration with commerce intelligence platform Criteo. The partnership, announced Thursday (June 25) by the grocery giant’s retail media arm Albertsons Media Collective, is designed to bring product discovery into Albertsons artificial intelligence-powered conversational search. “As customers increasingly turn to AI-driven tools for inspiration and guidance, Albertso

entries.title: Scaled Cognition Raises $100 Million to Address AI Hallucinations
entries.summary: AI lab Scaled Cognition has raised $100 million in new funding. The company’s Series A round, announced Thursday (June 9), values Scaled Cognition at $750 million and will help it expand its research team and speed product development. entries.title: Medicare’s AI Pilot Proves Approvals Are Easy. Payments Are Hard.
entries.summary: The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) launched the WISeR Model in January, short for Wasteful and Inappropriate Service Reduction Model, with the aim of “decreasing costs and easing administrative burden on providers and suppliers,” according to the CMS. The program deploys AI-assisted prior authorization in traditional Medicare for the first time and requires […] The post M

entries.title: Jack Henry partner Google Cloud for AI-driven security
entries.summary: Jack Henry (Nasdaq: JKHY) and Google Cloud today announced an expanded collaboration to deliver AI-driven security capabilities for banks and credit unions. Building on their strategic relationship established in 2022, Jack Henry will use Google Cloud's suite of agentic defense products to develop a proprietary AI security platform purpose-built for the financial services ecosystem.

entries.title: BIS warns of stablecoin 'structural flaws'
entries.summary: Stablecoins, as currently designed, have structural flaws that could affect macroeconomic and financial stability if they were to see widespread adoption, according to the Bank for International Settlements.

entries.title: Arca raises $64m for AI-native wealth management
entries.summary: Arca, an AI-native wealth management startup promising to humanise the sector in the age of robo-advisors, has emerged from stealth with $64 million in funding.

entries.title: N26 Turns First Annual Profit as Revenue Surpasses €500 Million
entries.summary: N26 reached its first full year of net profitability in 2025, with revenue climbing past €500 million as the German digital bank leaned on higher deposit income and a larger base of paying customers. The lender posted group net income of €1.6 million for the year, a swing from a €42 million loss in 2024, according to figures the company released today (Thursday). N26 Swings to €1.6 Million Profit

entries.title: Sports Betting Moves Further Into Prediction Markets as Novig Wins CFTC Approval
entries.summary: Peer-to-peer sports trading platform Novig can now operate as a federally regulated prediction market. The company says the approval process was the fastest for any Designated Contract Market in CFTC history. The designation, granted to its Ludlow Exchange LLC entity, creates a federal route to offer sports-based event contracts without relying on state-by-state sportsbook licensing models. A Diff

entries.title: SBI Holdings to buy crypto exchange Bitbank for $289m
entries.summary: Japanese financial conglomerate SBI Holdings has agreed a deal to buy local crypto exchange Bitbank for around $289 million.

entries.title: Google Finance gets an app
entries.summary: Google has launched a dedicated mobile app for its recently revamped, AI-infused, financial data, news and analytics service.
